_comment: Recommended VSCode extensions for cOde(n). Same as the dev repo — VSCode shows this list as a popup the first time a developer opens the project, so the right tooling is one click away. The Python extension is required (the engine + tools/run_solution.py are Python). Pylance gives proper intellisense for the engine package. The Debugpy extension is what powers the 'Run current challenge (debug)' launch config.
